name: Lime Glazed Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour with salt and lemon pepper.
2. Season the chicken breasts with salt, lemon pepper, and garlic powder.
3. Dredge the chicken in the flour mixture, then egg, and finally the flour mixture again.
4. Brown the chicken in a hot skillet until cooked through, turning several times.
5. Remove the cooked chicken from the skillet and deglaze it with chicken broth.
6. Stir while cooking to reduce the liquid by half.
7. Add lime juice and cook down several minutes until thickened.
8. Drizzle over the cooked chicken pieces and garnish with fresh lime slices and parsley.
9. Serves 4.
